data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 4/3 (Mon), Lesson, Scrimmages, Commissions rewards will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students and exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 4/3 (Mon) 19:00 – 4/10 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
